description: Si riferisce alla concentrazione di massa in un dato volume. Materiali ad alta densità offrono resistenza e non si deformano facilmente, mentre quelli a bassa densità cedono e si adattano.
positive: The lead weight felt dense and unyielding in my hand, a solid presence.
Sinto il peso del ferro battuto, una densità che resiste alla pressione.
Meine Faust traf auf den Stahl, eine dichte Masse ohne Nachgiebigkeit.
The granite countertop felt incredibly dense, almost immovable under my touch.
Je sentais la densité du bronze, une résistance palpable sous mes doigts.
The tungsten sphere, *gravis*, was remarkably dense and heavy.
His grip, *tenax*, felt dense and firm, a solid anchor.
The iron ingot was dense, its weight pressing down on my shoulder.
The dense ceramic tile felt immutable, resisting my attempt to shift it.
This chunk of quartz felt dense, a concentrated mass of minerals.
The dense metal bar offered substantial resistance when I pushed against it.
Sostanza densa, il piombo non cede alla mia leggera pressione.
The dense block of marble felt substantial and immobile in my grasp.
Je ressens la densité de ce morceau d'acier, une résistance intense.
The dense clay felt firm and unyielding beneath my fingers.
Die massive Stahlplatte fühlte sich dicht und unbeweglich an.
El lingote de hierro era denso, su peso presionaba sobre mi hombro.
The dense polymer felt solid and resistant to deformation.
The dense core of the meteorite felt profoundly weighty.
Sento la densità del metallo, una sensazione di peso e resistenza.
The dense packing of the sand felt firm and stable beneath my feet.
This dense piece of wood doesn't bend easily, it resists.
Le denseur de presse, *gravis*, est une masse compacte et solide.
The dense alloy felt cool and substantial in my palm.
Sentivo la densità del piombo, un peso che mi affaticava.
The dense concrete block offered unwavering stability.
La densité du plomb est palpable, une résistance constante.
The dense resin felt firm and unyielding to my touch.
The dense core of the asteroid felt incredibly heavy.
Die dichte Masse des Metalls war schwer zu bewegen.
El acero es denso, no se dobla con facilidad.
The dense packing of the gravel felt solid under my boots.
Sentivo la densità della pietra, una resistenza inamovibile.
The dense polymer felt like a solid, immovable mass.
Je pouvais sentir la densité du métal, une sensation de poids et de solidité.
negative: The foam felt light and yielding, easily compressed under my hand.
La schiuma di poliuretano è leggera, si deforma facilmente sotto la pressione.
Le coton est léger et se déforme facilement sous mon contact.
The packing peanuts were so light, they floated easily in the air.
Meine Hand drückte auf die Watte, eine leichte und nachgiebige Textur.
The aerogel felt airy and almost nonexistent in my grasp.
The feathers drifted easily, light and ephemeral in the breeze.
La piuma, *levis*, galleggiava leggera, senza resistenza.
The sponge compressed easily, offering little resistance to pressure.
This piece of cork is light and easily compressible.
Il polistirolo è leggero e si adatta facilmente alla mia mano.
The styrofoam felt insubstantial, barely there under my touch.
Je sentais la légèreté du coton, une absence de résistance.
Die leichte Feder schwebte sanft in der Luft.
El corcho es ligero y se comprime fácilmente.
Sentivo la leggerezza del cotone, una sensazione di assenza.
The down feathers felt incredibly light and airy.
Le ballon était léger, *levis*, et se déplaçait facilement.
The balsa wood felt fragile and easily bent.
The air-filled cushion felt light and yielding.
The fluffy wool felt insubstantial and easily compressed.
Sentivo la leggerezza delle piume, quasi non ci fossero.
The packing foam felt almost nonexistent under my hand.
Le papier est léger et se froisse facilement.
Die leichte Wolle fühlte sich zerbrechlich und nachgiebig an.
El plumas se sentían ligeras y se dispersaban con facilidad.
The lightweight fabric felt almost like nothing.
Sentivo la leggerezza della schiuma, una sensazione di vuoto.
The airy foam felt easily compressed and deformed.
Le liège est léger et se déforme facilement sous la pression.
The fluffy cotton felt delicate and easily displaced.
Die leichte Plastikfolie knisterte und dehnte sich leicht.
El papel de seda es ligero y se arruga con facilidad.
Sentivo la leggerezza del piumino, una sensazione di etereità.
The light plastic wrap felt flimsy and easily torn.
Je pouvais sentir la légèreté du papier, une sensation de fragilité.
